prompt: /ulw redesign this incident dashboard so an on-call lead can understand severity and take the right action within thirty seconds

hard_checks.description: Every displayed severity, metric, and incident state matches the supplied data.
The highest-priority incident and its next safe action are visible without exploration.
Keyboard flow, contrast, semantics, and non-color status cues meet the fixture acceptance checks.

rubric.audience: An on-call lead making a time-sensitive operational decision under stress.
constraints: Keep critical actions safe and reversible.
non_goals: Hide operational complexity behind decorative minimalism
task_specific_anchors: Severity, consequence, ownership, and next action form one unmistakable decision hierarchy.
The design handles degraded, stale, partial, and quiet states deliberately.
The result advances beyond a prettier dashboard into a coherent incident-response instrument.
